cliTools.name: gh
cliTools.usage: Reads the QA report (`gh issue view --json comments`), appends to the goals manifest, and opens fix-ticket issues.

inputs.name: issue
inputs.describe: Issue number carrying qa-engineer's QA report (the comment with the <!-- KODY_QA_REPORT_JSON --> block).

inputs.name: scope
inputs.describe: Optional scope label for the goal name (e.g. the changelog entry title). Defaults to 'smoke'.

inputs.name: goal
inputs.describe: Optional existing goal id to attach findings to instead of creating a new one.
